ragDocuments.title: Persistent verification circular
ragDocuments.summary: Persistent RAG document used to verify that indexed chunks and object-store source snapshots survive backend restarts.

ragDocuments.title: Tax compliance review SOP
ragDocuments.summary: Explains that AI-generated compliance deviations are prioritization signals requiring human review.

ragDocuments.title: Vehicle and asset signal guidance
ragDocuments.summary: Defines luxury/high-value vehicles and assets as review signals when declared income is materially lower.

ragDocuments.title: Citizen correction and appeal policy
ragDocuments.summary: Requires a transparent correction path for mismatched or stale civic records.

ragDocuments.title: Business ownership income review note
ragDocuments.summary: Business directorship or ownership should be compared with filing behavior and declared income.

ragChunks.title: Tax compliance review SOP
ragChunks.text: Audit officers must treat AI-generated compliance deviations as prioritization signals only. A case requires human review, source verification, evidence quality checks, and a citizen correction window before escalation. Reports must include a watermark, evidence identifiers, policy citations, and a warning that the score does not prove fraud.

ragChunks.title: Vehicle and asset signal guidance
ragChunks.text: Luxury vehicles, high engine capacity registrations, and high-value residential or commercial property can be reviewed when materially inconsistent with declared income. Asset signals must be correlated with ownership dates, filing behavior, utility consumption, and business relationships before any enforcement recommendation.

ragChunks.title: Citizen correction and appeal policy
ragChunks.text: Citizens must receive a safe explanation that avoids investigative tactics and does not expose peer comparisons. Correction submissions should allow stale ownership, outdated utility records, incorrect business links, and already-declared income evidence. Human reviewers must consider correction evidence before closure.

ragChunks.title: Business ownership income review note
ragChunks.text: Business directorship, shareholder, and partnership relationships should be compared with declared income, tax paid, filer status, and asset purchases. A business relationship alone is not a violation; it is a review signal when paired with undeclared or materially inconsistent economic activity.

ragChunks.title: Persistent verification circular
ragChunks.text: Persistent RAG document used to verify that indexed chunks and object-store source snapshots survive backend restarts.

messages: Generated lexical embeddings, chunk metadata, and citation records.

timelineEvents.summary: Audit report rpt-case-P001-20260610194413 generated and stored at s3://taxnet-dev-audit-reports/audit-reports/case-P001/rpt-case-P001-20260610194413.json.

reports.summary: Muhammad Ali Khan was flagged for human review because the declared tax profile is inconsistent with observed asset, consumption, and business signals. The current score is 98/100 (Critical) with 98% confidence.

metadata.query: What policy supports human review before escalation?

NADRA.notes: Sandbox contract configured so official API credentials can be swapped through Secrets Manager.
